label: Cited Data
definition: Data explicitly stated or cited in the original study text.

label: Qualitative Assessment
definition: Qualitative judgment or opinion expressed by the author.

label: Internal Research
definition: Based on the author's or organization's internal research and benchmarking.

label: Inferred
definition: Value inferred by the archivist from context in the original text.

label: Retrospective
definition: Outcome or status determined retrospectively at time of archival ingest.

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative market information.

label: Market Trend
definition: Directional market movement or adoption pattern.

label: Procurement Behavior
definition: Organizational purchasing decisions or patterns.

label: Benchmark
definition: Technical performance measurement or specification.

label: Performance Assessment
definition: Subjective or qualitative evaluation of system performance.

label: Workload Measurement
definition: Measured resource consumption or utilization.

label: Planning Parameter
definition: Organizational planning assumption or target.

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking assessment of technology or market viability.

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Retrospectively determined result compared to predictions or state at study time.

label: Recommendation
definition: Author's explicit recommendation for action.

label: Specification
definition: Industry specification or standard.

label: Resource Demand
definition: Assessment of computing resource consumption trends.

label: Workload Inventory
definition: Enumeration of software or services running on a system.

label: Research Firm
definition: Technology research and advisory firm.

label: Corporation
definition: Commercial business entity.

label: Person
definition: Individual contributor or author.

label: Corporate Cohort
definition: Named group of companies used as reference class.

label: Active
definition: Entity is currently operating.

label: Acquired
definition: Entity was acquired by another organization.

label: Unknown
definition: Current status of entity is not determined.

label: Current Generation
definition: Technology was current/new at the time of the study.

label: Previous Generation
definition: Technology was one generation behind at study time.

label: Pre-release
definition: Technology was announced but not yet released at study time.

label: Mature
definition: Technology was well-established and widely deployed at study time.

label: Legacy
definition: Technology was outdated but still in some use at study time.

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology is no longer in meaningful use.

label: Active
definition: Technology remains in active use or production.

label: High Confidence
definition: Data point is explicitly stated or well-established.

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Data point is reasonably supported but involves some interpretation.

label: Low Confidence
definition: Data point involves significant interpretation or uncertainty.

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative performance measurement from a formal or informal benchmark

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment from a domain practitioner

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity, capabilities, or fitness
